TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Isaias_Afwerki, title = Isaias_Afwerki, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Isaias_Afwerki} }

S.FORM: = Isaias Afewerki = Mntucing hngkawas 1946 idas 2 jiyax 2 ka Isaias Afwerki ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Eritrea ta sayang o kiya ka Isaias Afwerki, pnaah hngkawas 1993 idas 5 jiyax 24 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. = Isaias Afwerki = Isaias Afwerki (Kari Tigrayans: ŠäĘŠą≥Šč≠ŠčęŠąĶ Šä£ŠćąŠčąŠą≠ŠČā, kngkawas 1946 idas 2 diyax 2Ôľć) pa Eritrea na pnrdingan bay qnlhangan Weynso mi Soto Eritrea, Jnmin Mincu Mi Cngyi Cnseyng Congyang Yingkay Cusi. Kndusan cuxal Isaias Afwerki pa mntuting Eritrea Asmara(sotu) na nniqan Aba Shi'Aul, mnuyas Pyasan Tukcka Makonnen (PMSS). Mniq kngkawas 1960 prading cida, Isaias Afwerki u tumal Minjoku Cuyi Eritrea Laqi Muyas Undo. Kngkawas 1965 cida, Isaias Afwerki u prading mniq Ethiopia Addis Abeba na Pyasan Tubeyhing Haile Selassie I (Saya daw aplawa dha Pyasan Tubeyhing Addis Abeba) na Kongcng Sweyweyn muyas. Dukuricu Undo Kngkawas 1991 idas 5, dndulan Isaias Afwerki Eritrea Jnmin Ptrawah Cnseyng u wada mbiyax mnuda 30 knkawas Eritrea dukuricu mccbu. Babaw pnhiyu qnlhangan Kngkawas 1993 Eritrea u snpeyyah Ethiopia Jnmin Nincu Konghkwo dukuricu daw, Isaias Afwerki u puda murux tang qmlahang seyhu na Jnmin Mincu mi Cngyi pusa hangan ngalan Soto dhuq saya. Smriq kari Isaias Afwerki u alaw smliq biyax sediq kiya mi wada qlhangan bay UN mi Kwoci Tese Pnsliyan. Uka Ayuc Qnlhangan Kisya ida lmutuc mkkawas wada dha pnaun quri hangan ka seyhu dndulan Isaias Afwerki na Eritrea u pniqan dha qalux hangan ka singbung mtrawah csu dha Eritrea.
S.PHON: = isaias a*…ôw…ô…ĺki = mntu ¶iŇč ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax * ka isaias a*w…ô…ĺki ga, …ômpklaw ka ńßija. bukuŇč klwaan …ô…ĺit…ĺ…ôa ta sajaŇč o kija ka isaias a*w…ô…ĺki, pnaańß ńßŇčkawas **** idas * …üijax ** pn…ĺa…üiŇč kmlawa klwaan. = isaias a*w…ô…ĺki = isaias a*w…ô…ĺki (ka…ĺi tig…ĺajans: ***** *****, kŇčkawas **** idas * dijax **) pa …ô…ĺit…ĺ…ôa na pn…ĺdiŇčan baj qnlńßaŇčan w…ônso mi soto …ô…ĺit…ĺ…ôa, …ünmin min ¶u mi ¶Ňčji ¶ns…ôŇč ¶oŇčjaŇč jiŇčkaj ¶usi. kndusan ¶uxal isaias a*w…ô…ĺki pa mntutiŇč …ô…ĺit…ĺ…ôa asma…ĺa(sotu) na nniqan aba sńßi'aul, mnujas pjasan tuk ¶ka makonn…ôn (pmss). mniq kŇčkawas **** p…ĺadiŇč ¶ida, isaias a*w…ô…ĺki u tumal min…üoku ¶uji …ô…ĺit…ĺ…ôa laqi mujas undo. kŇčkawas **** ¶ida, isaias a*w…ô…ĺki u p…ĺadiŇč mniq …ôtńßiopia addis ab…ôba na pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč ńßail…ô s…ôlassi…ô i (saja daw aplawa dńßa pjasan tub…ôńßiŇč addis ab…ôba) na koŇč ¶Ňč sw…ôw…ôn mujas. duku…ĺi ¶u undo kŇčkawas **** idas *, dndulan isaias a*w…ô…ĺki …ô…ĺit…ĺ…ôa …ünmin pt…ĺawańß ¶ns…ôŇč u wada mbijax mnuda ** knkawas …ô…ĺit…ĺ…ôa duku…ĺi ¶u m ¶ ¶bu. babaw pnńßiju qnlńßaŇčan kŇčkawas **** …ô…ĺit…ĺ…ôa u snp…ôjańß …ôtńßiopia …ünmin nin ¶u koŇčńßkwo duku…ĺi ¶u daw, isaias a*w…ô…ĺki u puda mu…ĺux taŇč qmlańßaŇč s…ôńßu na …ünmin min ¶u mi ¶Ňčji pusa ńßaŇčan Ňčalan soto dńßuq saja. sm…ĺiq ka…ĺi isaias a*w…ô…ĺki u alaw smliq bijax s…ôdiq kija mi wada qlńßaŇčan baj un mi kwo ¶i t…ôs…ô pnslijan. uka aju ¶ qnlńßaŇčan kisja ida lmutu ¶ mkkawas wada dńßa pnaun qu…ĺi ńßaŇčan ka s…ôńßu dndulan isaias a*w…ô…ĺki na …ô…ĺit…ĺ…ôa u pniqan dńßa qalux ńßaŇčan ka siŇčbuŇč mt…ĺawańß ¶su dńßa …ô…ĺit…ĺ…ôa.
S.FORM: = Isaias Afewerki = Mntucing hngkawas 1946 idas 2 jiyax 2 ka Isaias Afwerki ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Eritrea ta sayang o kiya ka Isaias Afwerki, pnaah hngkawas 1993 idas 5 jiyax 24 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. = Isaias Afwerki = Isaias Afwerki (Kari Tigrayans: ŠäĘŠą≥Šč≠ŠčęŠąĶ Šä£ŠćąŠčąŠą≠ŠČā, kngkawas 1946 idas 2 diyax 2Ôľć) pa Eritrea na pnrdingan bay qnlhangan Weynso mi Soto Eritrea, Jnmin Mincu Mi Cngyi Cnseyng Congyang Yingkay Cusi. Kndusan cuxal Isaias Afwerki pa mntuting Eritrea Asmara(sotu) na nniqan Aba Shi'Aul, mnuyas Pyasan Tukcka Makonnen (PMSS). Mniq kngkawas 1960 prading cida, Isaias Afwerki u tumal Minjoku Cuyi Eritrea Laqi Muyas Undo. Kngkawas 1965 cida, Isaias Afwerki u prading mniq Ethiopia Addis Abeba na Pyasan Tubeyhing Haile Selassie I (Saya daw aplawa dha Pyasan Tubeyhing Addis Abeba) na Kongcng Sweyweyn muyas. Dukuricu Undo Kngkawas 1991 idas 5, dndulan Isaias Afwerki Eritrea Jnmin Ptrawah Cnseyng u wada mbiyax mnuda 30 knkawas Eritrea dukuricu mccbu. Babaw pnhiyu qnlhangan Kngkawas 1993 Eritrea u snpeyyah Ethiopia Jnmin Nincu Konghkwo dukuricu daw, Isaias Afwerki u puda murux tang qmlahang seyhu na Jnmin Mincu mi Cngyi pusa hangan ngalan Soto dhuq saya. Smriq kari Isaias Afwerki u alaw smliq biyax sediq kiya mi wada qlhangan bay UN mi Kwoci Tese Pnsliyan. Uka Ayuc Qnlhangan Kisya ida lmutuc mkkawas wada dha pnaun quri hangan ka seyhu dndulan Isaias Afwerki na Eritrea u pniqan dha qalux hangan ka singbung mtrawah csu dha Eritrea.
